title: Remote support poll storm fix (502 / black video)
description:
Support chat and remote assistance were opening dozens of overlapping fetch requests (messages, active, presence) when the server slowed down, causing 502 errors and black video. All support polls now chain one-at-a-time with in-flight guards; GET requests are deduplicated; fetch times out after 12s. Non-critical polls pause or slow during active remote sessions.

Who is affected: remote help and support chat on pipeshare.live.
changeLog: Chained support pollers — no overlapping poll ticks.
GET request coalescing + 12s fetch timeout in support-api.js.
Slower chat poll during active remote; skip redundant active-session polls.
Admin heartbeat no longer hammers /chat/active every 20s during remote.
